tracks.rawText: 3:18Letra (3)v5.5CoverReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth bassline provides the harmonic foundation, Melodic elements include a staccato, high-pitched synth lead playing a repetitive minor-key hook and occasional atmospheric pad swells, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light saturation, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, The production uses frequent rhythmic mutes, riser effects, and vocal chops for transitions, Percussion includes woodblock-style hits and shakers that accent the off-beats2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Letra (3)

tracks.rawText: 3:04Letra (3)v5.5CoverReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth bassline provides the harmonic foundation, Melodic elements include a staccato, high-pitched synth lead playing a repetitive minor-key hook and occasional atmospheric pad swells, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light saturation, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, The production uses frequent rhythmic mutes, riser effects, and vocal chops for transitions, Percussion includes woodblock-style hits and shakers that accent the off-beats2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:08That's So True [2292577853]v5.5CoverBrazilian Funk Carioca at 130 BPM in G minor, The track features a heavy, distorted sub-bass that follows a syncopated rhythmic pattern characteristic of the genre, A sharp, metallic snare hits on the off-beats, layered with a dry, punchy kick drum, High-pitched, staccato synth stabs repeat a two-note motif throughout the arrangement, The male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, aggressive chant style with heavy use of vocal chops and stutter effects, A recurring vocal sample is processed with a high-pass filter and rapid gating, The production utilizes frequent silence and sudden drops to emphasize the rhythmic transitions2PublishRemix
tracks.title: That's So True [2292577853]

tracks.rawText: 2:39Lapicero Balasv5.5Rap con trompetas en primer plano: fanfarrias staccato y riffs en octavas sobre boom bap crujiente, bombo seco, caja con rimshot y hats con swing, Bajo 808 redondo, scratches sutiles, piano eléctrico oscuro y capas de brass con delay corto, Intro con filtro telefónico y drops secos, verso denso y hook explosivo1PublishRemix
